raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Nadabs Jerobeama
Dehls tappe par Kehninu pahr
Israëlu/ ohtrâ Gaddâ Affus ta
Kehnina no Juhda / un waldija
Diwi Gaddus pahr Israëlu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch darrija / kas
tam KUNGAṀ ne patiſke / un
staigaja us fawaTehwa Zelfteem/
un eekſch winna Grehkeem / ar
ko wiꞥſch Israëlu bij darrijs
grehkoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Baësus Akija Dehls
no Ibsafchaza Namma/ darrija
weenu Derribu prett winnu/ un
Baësus katwe to Gibetonâ / kas
teem Wilistexeem peederreja. Jo
Nadabs un wiſs Israëls bij prett
Gibetonu apmettuschees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Baësus nokawe to
trechâ Gaddâ Affus ta Kehnina
no Juhda/ un tappe par Kehni-
nu winna Weetâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tas waldija / tad
4. kawe tas wiſſu Jerobeama Nam-
mu/ wiꞥſch ne atlizzinaja no Je-
robeama ne ko / kam Dwascha
bija / teekains wiꞥſch to bij is-
deldejs pehz ta KUNGA Wahr-
du / ko wiꞥſch bij runnajes zaur
fawu Kalpu Aktju to Siloniteri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "To Grehku Jerobeama
deht/ ar ko wiꞥſch apgrehkojahs/
un Israëlu darrijs grehkoht/ un
wianna Apkaitinatchanas deht /
ar ko wiꞥſch to KUNGU Israë-
la Deewu bij apkaitinaajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kas wehl atteek no Na-
daba Yeetahin/un wiſs/ko wiꞥſch
vesim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un starp Affu un Baë-
to Israëta Kehninu bija Karf-
wifſa winna Laika.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Trefchâ Gaddâ Affus t
Kehnina no Juhda/ tappe B-
esus Akijus Dehls par Kehnin-
pahr wiſſu Israëlu Tirza / u
(waldija) diwide+mits un tsche-
rus Gaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch darrija / ka
tam KUNGAṀ ne patiſke / u-
staigaja us Jerobeama Zelfu-
un eekſch winna Grehkeem / ar
t
wiꞥſch Israëlu bij darrijs gre-
koht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta KUNGA Wahri-
notiſke us Jeü Ananus Deh-
prett Baësu/ fazzid ains:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapelz ka es tew no tee
Pihſchleem efimu pa-augstinaj-
un tew par Walditajn pada-
rijs pahr manneem Israëta La-
dim/ un tu us Jerobeama Ze-
efi staigajs / un mannus Is-
etâ Eaudis darrijs grehkoht /
tee mann ar faueem Grehke-
apkattina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rangi/ tad atmettischu
Baësus Pehznahkamus/un wi-
na Namma Pehznahkamus/
darritchu tawu Namnu ka Je-
beana Neebata Dehla Namnu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kas no Baësus Pilstä-
mirst/ to tee Sunni ehdihs/
kas no winna Lankâ mirst /
ehdihs tee Putni appakſch D
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
